seoTitle: Build a Website Using Google Workspace's Google Sites
metaDescription: Create a professional website with Google Sites through your Google Workspace account, no coding needed, with a custom domain and easy publishing.
intro: Google Workspace includes Google Sites, a free drag-and-drop website builder that lets you create a professional site for a business, portfolio, or internal team without writing any code. This guide walks through building pages, adding a custom domain, embedding content like forms and videos, and publishing with your own branding. It's suited to small businesses, freelancers, and teams who want a fast, cloud-hosted website using tools already included in their Workspace plan.

steps.heading: Access Google Sites via Google Workspace
steps.body: Google Sites is included with your Workspace plan, so start by opening it from your account to begin building your website.

steps.heading: Create pages and sections
steps.body: Use the drag-and-drop interface to build out the pages and sections your site needs, without requiring any coding knowledge.

steps.heading: Add a custom domain
steps.body: Connect a custom domain from Google Domains or a third-party registrar so your site uses your own web address instead of a default one.

steps.heading: Embed forms, maps, videos, and calendars
steps.body: Enhance your site by embedding tools like forms, Google Maps, YouTube videos, and calendars directly into your pages.

steps.heading: Publish your site with professional branding
steps.body: Once your pages are ready, publish the site so it's live, applying your own branding elements throughout.

steps.heading: Manage access and collaboration
steps.body: Control who can edit or view the site and collaborate with your team directly within Google Sites' access settings.

faq.question: Do I need coding skills to build a site with Google Sites?
faq.answer: No, Google Sites uses a drag-and-drop interface specifically so you can build a website without any coding required.

faq.question: Can I use my own domain name with Google Sites?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add a custom domain from Google Domains or a third-party provider to your Google Sites website.

faq.question: Is Google Sites included with my Google Workspace plan?
faq.answer: Yes, Google Sites is one of the tools already included in Google Workspace plans, so there's no extra cost to use it.

faq.question: Can I embed things like YouTube videos or Google Forms?
faq.answer: Yes, Google Sites supports embedding forms, maps, YouTube videos, calendars, and similar content directly into your pages.

faq.question: Can multiple team members work on the same site?
faq.answer: Yes, you can manage access and collaborate with your team directly within Google Sites, similar to other Google Workspace tools.
